content_body:
November 2021 ~ We all had the BEST couples weekend! We loved the space and atmosphere of this cabin. We enjoyed lots of delicious foods, WINNING football games, napping, games, laughs, and memories. 

We cannot wait to come back! 

P.S. Go get some rum cake from The Rum Cake Lady in Downtown Blue Ridge!
title: Memorable Couples Weekend in Blue Ridge, GA
